"'''Three Tentacle'''" was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] living in the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Underworld]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. He helped guard the [[World Brain]].
